c4r 0.1.0.9001

Render a C4 diagram tuned for pkgdown sites

Source: R/pkgdown.R
pkgdown_diagram.Rd

Wraps a diagram object (or htmlwidget) so that it fills the available Bootstrap 5 column width and respects a fixed pixel height. Diagrams returned by c4_context() and friends already render inline in Rmarkdown/Quarto, but their default width is unbounded and looks awkward on a pkgdown page; this helper sets sensible defaults.

Usage

pkgdown_diagram(diagram, height = "500px", width = "100%")

Arguments

diagram

A DiagrammeR htmlwidget (output of c4_context() etc.).

height

CSS height for the diagram container (e.g. "500px").

width

CSS width for the diagram container (default "100%").

Value

The diagram with width/height set, ready for printing.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
diagram <- c4_from_template("three_tier")
pkgdown_diagram(diagram, height = "600px")
} # }

On this page

Developed by Fabian Distler.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
